description: Lint a finished deck (PDF, PPTX/PPT, or TEX) for common issues: slide count vs. talk duration, file size, slide dimensions/aspect ratio, small fonts and bullet overload (PPTX), and LaTeX compilation (TEX).
rules: read-only on the input deck; writes a text report under record_store
PDF analysis needs PyPDF2; PPTX analysis needs python-pptx; TEX compilation needs pdflatex
DURATION (minutes) is optional — enables slide-count-vs-duration guidance
usage: Set DECK_PATH (the .pdf/.pptx/.tex file); optionally DURATION in minutes. Output: validation_report.txt.
limitation: TEX validation shells out to pdflatex (absent here → reported as a failed compile, not a crash). Missing PyPDF2/python-pptx degrade to warnings, still exit 0.
